_comment_top: Praeventio Guard — Google Workspace Marketplace SDK config TEMPLATE. Each `_form_section` field maps to a section of the Marketplace SDK 'App Configuration' page in GCP Console (APIs & Services → Marketplace SDK → App Configuration). Copy values verbatim into the form. JSON comments are illegal in strict JSON, so we use sibling `_form_section_*` keys to document mapping; strip them before any tool that validates schema.
name: Guardian Praeventio
_form_section_name: App Configuration → App name (max 50 chars). Must match OAuth Consent Screen 'App name' EXACTLY or the listing is rejected.
description: Plataforma de prevención de riesgos laborales con IA para Chile y LATAM. Cumplimiento DS 54 / DS 40 / Ley 16.744 + ISO 45001.
_form_section_description: App Configuration → Short description (max 200 chars). Same string also goes into the Listing form 'Short description' field — keep them identical.
_form_section_supportContact: App Configuration → Support contact. Must be a real inbox monitored ≥ 1 business day. Google sends reviewer questions here.
_form_section_developerName: App Configuration → Developer name. Use the legal SpA name once incorporated; until then use 'Praeventio Guard' as a doing-business-as.
_form_section_developerWebsite: App Configuration → Developer website. Domain MUST be verified in Search Console under the same Google account submitting the listing.
_form_section_privacyPolicyUrl: App Configuration → Privacy policy URL. Must return 200 over HTTPS, must be in the same domain or a verified subdomain. Reviewers click this link.
_form_section_termsOfServiceUrl: App Configuration → Terms of service URL. Same domain rule. Spanish-CL primary text recommended for our market.
_form_section_universalNavigationUrl: App Integration → Universal navigation URL (the deep link Workspace launches when an admin clicks the app icon in the Workspace app launcher). Must serve a logged-in app surface, not the marketing homepage.
_form_section_categories: Listing → Categories. Pick up to 3 from Google's enum. 'Productivity' + 'Industry-specific' (Mining/Construction/Health) are the closest matches. 'safety' is illustrative — confirm exact enum at submit time.
_form_section_languages: Listing → Supported languages. es-CL primary; es-419 for LATAM Spanish; en as international fallback.
_form_section_supportedRegions: Listing → Region availability. PRICING.md commits to multi-país sin recargo, ISO 45001 fallback for any country.

oauth._form_section_scopes: App Integration → OAuth scopes. Each scope listed here MUST also be listed on the OAuth Consent Screen page AND have a justification in scope-justifications.md. Sensitive scopes (calendar.events, drive.file) trigger OAuth verification (5-15 business days).
oauth._form_section_deprecatedScopes: DO NOT submit these to Google. The Google Fit REST API sunsets 2026-12-31; we are migrating to Health Connect (Android) + HealthKit (iOS), both on-device, no OAuth scope. See HEALTH_CONNECT_MIGRATION.md. Listed here only for our own audit trail.

_form_section_visibility: App Configuration → Visibility. 'public' = listed in the public Marketplace. 'unlisted' = direct-link-only. 'private' = single-domain only. We want public.

installSettings._form_section_individualInstall: App Configuration → Allow individual install (workers can install on personal Workspace).
installSettings._form_section_domainWideInstall: App Configuration → Allow domain-wide install (Workspace admins can install for entire org). Required for Titanio+ enterprise tier from PRICING.md.
installSettings._form_section_minimumWorkspaceTier: App Configuration → Minimum Workspace edition. 'any' covers Business Starter and up. We do not require Enterprise.

branding._form_section_iconUrl: Branding → App icon (128×128 PNG with transparency). See assets-spec.md.

_unfilled_form_fields_to_complete_in_con: App Configuration → Pub/Sub topic for events (optional; needed only if we subscribe to install/uninstall webhooks). Decide at submit time.
App Integration → Drive integration manifest (optional; only if we register file extensions). Skip for v1.
App Integration → Gmail integration (Add-on manifest; not applicable v1).
App Integration → Calendar add-on manifest (we hit Calendar API server-side, not as an add-on; skip).
Pricing → Pricing model. The form does NOT yet support our 10-tier hybrid model; pick 'External pricing' and link to https://praeventio.net/pricing.
